text: Stepping from a quiet, empty presentation space into this vibrant, idea-filled exhibit, I feel a distinct shift. The first space is full of potential, waiting to be animated by conversation and thought. Here, surrounded by words and images exploring research and innovation, I feel a sense of intellectual curiosity and anticipation—a readiness for new connections, insights, and shared moments of pondering our place in the world and the ever-unfolding dance between humanity and technology.
